params.name: Allspark
params.description: The Allspark is the source of life on the planet Canabilis, granting each Canabilis individual life and personality, with its power flowing through the veins of every mechanical lifeform. However, when the Allspark mysteriously disappeared, Canabilis fell into an unprecedented crisis, and a great war ensued...
